data.title: 国际服2022新年奖励
data.summary: [Adieu 2021 Hello 2022] We're sending gifts for five days to show our appreciation for your support
data.body:
[Adieu 2021 Hello 2022]

We're sending gifts for five days to show our appreciation for your support in 2021. Here's to staying together in 2022, Sensei!

🗓️Period: 12/29/2021 (Wed) - 01/02/2022 (Sun) (UTC)
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/95854
